acquisition method: for data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mass spectrometry (MS) analysis.
cleavage agent: Trypsin was selected as a digestion enzyme.
instrument: separated with a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
labeling: the peptides were separated by a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer that was coupled to an Easy nano liquid chromatography instrument (Thermo Scientific).
reduction reagent: 1 M DTT (final concentration of DTT: 100 mM)
